productDisplayName: Puma Men Sports Division Black Sweatshirt
description: Composition Black sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a round ribbed neck, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed hem and distressed graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron A perfect wear when the chill winds are blowing, this sweatshirt from puma is designed with trendy cuts and styled to perfection making it a fab addition to your wardrobe. The sporty print ups your style statement, while the full sleeves and ribbed cuffs and hem keep the chill at bay. Team it with jeans and boots. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
